claim: The PPR MDA5 has two N-terminal CARD domains.

result.claim: The PPR MDA5 has two N-terminal CARD domains.
result.reasoning: The searches for propositions and chunks related to "PPR MDA5 has two N-terminal CARD domains", "MDA5 CARD domains", "MDA5 N-terminal CARD domains", "MDA5 protein structure domains", and "MDA5 protein domains" did not yield any direct evidence to support or refute the claim. While some results mentioned MDA5 as a RIG-I-like receptor (RLR) (Paper ID: 31272411), none of the retrieved propositions or chunks specifically described the number or location of CARD domains in MDA5. The available evidence is insufficient to verify the claim.
